name: Robert Hughes

contactInfo.office: 703 N. Mallard St., Suite 102, Palestine, TX 75801

bio: Robert Hughes serves as the Anderson County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Anderson County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Palestine area.
campaignPromises: Keep Anderson County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
